ml_top_positive_drivers.interpretation: Clean promoter background — low character risk
No material litigation — low legal risk
Large listed company — asset base inferred

decision_rationale: Tata Motors Limited demonstrates exceptional creditworthiness, primarily driven by stellar Character (95) and Capital (95) scores, supported by a strong net worth of ₹116,144 crores and a conservative Debt/Equity of 0.6x. The company's robust Capacity (85) is evidenced by substantial revenues of ₹439,695 crores and a healthy 13.11% EBITDA margin, indicating strong operational performance and repayment capability. While market Conditions (70) present a mixed outlook, Tata Motors' strategic agility, including price increases and strong Q2 FY26 PV segment income, mitigates concerns. Overall, the blended risk score of 87.25/100 and AA rating affirm a low-risk profile, warranting approval.
